title: helictotrichon romeroizarcoi

side_effects: Helictotrichon romeroizarcoi can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and diarrhea, due to its high toxicity. Ingesting even small amounts of the plant can also cause allergic reactions, such as skin irritation and respiratory problems. Improper use of helictotrichon romeroizarcoi may also lead to kidney damage and liver failure in severe cases. Additionally, its sap can cause skin blisters and burns if not handled carefully.
